PRODUCT OVERVIEW
================

FRONT VIEW
----------

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: Front view diagram placeholder.
   :width: 420px

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1
   :widths: 36 64

   * - Item
     - Description
   * - Main POWER Button
     - Main power control.
   * - Handle
     - Carry handle for moving the unit.
   * - DC 12V Port
     - 12V, 10A max output.
   * - LCD
     - Displays status, power flow, and settings.
   * - DC/USB Power Button
     - Turns DC and USB outputs on or off.
   * - LED Light Button
     - Controls LED light mode.
   * - USB-C 30W Output
     - 30W max: 5V/3A, 9V/3A, 12V/2.5A, 15V/2A, 20V/1.5A.
   * - LED Light
     - Built-in light for illumination and SOS mode.
   * - USB-C 100W Output
     - 100W max: 5V/3A, 9V/3A, 12V/3A, 15V/3A, 20V/5A.
   * - AC Power Button
     - Turns AC output on or off.
   * - USB-A 18W Output
     - 18W max: 5-6V/3A, 6-9V/2A, 9-12V/1.5A.
   * - AC Output
     - 120V~ 60Hz, 18.3A max, 2200W rated.
   * - Total Output
     - 2200W rated, 4400W surge peak.

RIGHT SIDE VIEW
---------------

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: Right side view diagram placeholder.
   :width: 420px

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1
   :widths: 36 64

   * - Item
     - Description
   * - Handle
     - Side carry handle.
   * - AC Input
     - 100V-120V~ 60Hz, 15A max.
   * - DC Input (2 x DC8020 Ports)
     - PV: 16V-60V, 12A max, up to 21A / 400W max combined; Car: 11V-16V, 8A max.

.. note::

   Replace both overview placeholders with design-exported diagrams, while keeping the image path stable.
